title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at American Institute Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at American Institute Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at American Institute Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About American Institute Global Group:
American Institute Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
